Name: Zambia Agricultural Development Bond Series 2025-A
Description: 5-year agricultural development bond issued by Zanaco Asset Management. Backed by Eastern Province maize harvest forwards and warehouse receipts. Coupon: 8.25% p.a. SECZ-approved. Listed on LuSE.

Name: Zambia Agricultural Development Bond Series 2025-B
Description: 5-year agricultural development bond. Backed by Southern Province livestock herd tokens and cattle ranch land. Coupon: 8.50% p.a. SECZ-approved.

Name: Zambia Agricultural Development Bond Series 2025-C
Description: 5-year agricultural development bond. Backed by Kafue fisheries aquaculture tokens and tilapia pond certificates. Coupon: 7.75% p.a. SECZ-approved.

Name: Zambia Agricultural Development Bond Series 2025-D
Description: 7-year agricultural development bond. Backed by Chisamba Agro Farm warehouse receipts and standing crop tokens (maize, soya). Coupon: 9.00% p.a. SECZ-approved.

Name: Zambia Agricultural Development Bond Series 2025-E
Description: 3-year short-duration agricultural bond. Backed by Makeni Irrigated Estates irrigation rights and orchard tokens. Coupon: 7.00% p.a. SECZ-approved.

Name: Copperbelt SME Growth Bond 2025 – Series I
Description: 3-year SME bond for Copperbelt Province small businesses. Backed by a pool of 42 PACRA-registered SME asset tokens. Coupon: 10.50% p.a. Minimum denomination: ZMW 1,000. SECZ-approved.

Name: Copperbelt SME Growth Bond 2025 – Series II
Description: 3-year SME bond backed by Lusaka Bakers Guild invoice tokens and equipment assets. Coupon: 11.00% p.a. SECZ-approved.

Name: Copperbelt SME Growth Bond 2025 – Series III
Description: 5-year SME growth bond for Ndola and Kitwe emerging manufacturers. Backed by 28 tokenized SME equipment and receivable pools. Coupon: 10.00% p.a. SECZ-approved.

Name: Copperbelt SME Growth Bond 2025 – Series IV
Description: 2-year short-term SME bond backed by verified trade invoice tokens from Zambian retailers. Coupon: 12.25% p.a. SECZ-approved. CEEC co-guaranteed.

Name: Copperbelt SME Growth Bond 2025 – Series V
Description: Impact SME bond targeting women-owned enterprises in Central and Eastern Provinces. Backed by 35 SMEAsset tokens. Coupon: 9.75% p.a. SECZ-approved.

Name: Zambia Mineral Revenue Bond Series 2025 – Copper Tranche A
Description: 7-year sovereign-backed mining bond linked to copper mineral royalty token receipts from First Quantum Minerals. Coupon: 11.50% p.a. SECZ-approved. Bank of Zambia registered.

Name: Zambia Mineral Revenue Bond Series 2025 – Cobalt Tranche B
Description: 5-year mining bond linked to cobalt and copper royalty tokens from Vedanta Konkola Copper Mines. Coupon: 12.00% p.a. SECZ-approved.

Name: Zambia Mineral Revenue Bond Series 2025 – Rehabilitation Tranche C
Description: 10-year mining rehabilitation bond. Linked to MiningLicense and RehabilitationBond tokens from Ministry of Mines. Coupon: 9.25% p.a. SECZ-approved. ESG-aligned.

Name: Zambia Eastern Province Crop Token ETF – Class A
Description: Exchange-traded fund tracking a basket of 120 tokenized crop assets (maize, soya, wheat) from Eastern Province cooperatives. NAV updated daily. Listed on LuSE. Management fee: 0.45% p.a.

Name: Zambia Livestock & Herd Token ETF – Class A
Description: ETF tracking tokenized cattle, goat and small-stock herd holdings across Zambia’s Southern and Central Provinces. 85 livestock tokens in basket. Management fee: 0.55% p.a. Listed on LuSE.

Name: Zambia Aquaculture & Fisheries Token ETF – Class A
Description: ETF tracking tilapia aquaculture, kapenta fishery, and freshwater prawn tokens from Kafue and Luapula Provinces. Management fee: 0.60% p.a. Quarterly rebalancing.

Name: Zambia Agri-Land & Irrigation Token ETF – Class A
Description: ETF tracking FarmLand and IrrigationRight tokens across Lusaka, Central and Southern Provinces. 62 underlying assets. Management fee: 0.40% p.a. Listed on LuSE.

Name: Zambia Copper & Cobalt Mineral ETF – Class A
Description: ETF tracking tokenized copper and cobalt mineral royalty receipts from active Copperbelt mines. 48 mineral royalty tokens in basket. Tracks LME copper price. Management fee: 0.35% p.a. Listed on LuSE.

Name: Zambia Diversified Minerals ETF – Class A
Description: ETF tracking a diversified basket of copper, cobalt, lithium, manganese and gold tokens from Zambian mining companies. 72 underlying mineral tokens. Management fee: 0.50% p.a.

Name: Zambia Agricultural Commodity ETF – Class A
Description: ETF tracking tokenized warehouse receipt commodities (maize, soya, wheat, sunflower) from Zambia Commodity Exchange-registered warehouses. Management fee: 0.45% p.a.

Name: Zambia Green Climate Bond 2025 – REDD+ Tranche
Description: 7-year green bond backed by REDD+ carbon credit tokens from Luangwa Valley and Lower Zambezi National Park. Coupon: 7.50% p.a. Climate Bond Initiative certified. SECZ-approved.

Name: Zambia Green Climate Bond 2025 – Solar & Clean Energy Tranche
Description: 5-year green bond financing off-grid solar rollout in rural Zambia. Backed by RECertificate tokens from Zambia Carbon Registry. Coupon: 8.00% p.a. Climate Bond Initiative certified.

Name: Zambia Green Climate Bond 2025 – Biodiversity Tranche
Description: 10-year green bond for biodiversity conservation in Kafue National Park. Backed by BiodiversityCredit tokens. Coupon: 7.25% p.a. IUCN-aligned. SECZ-approved.

Name: Zambia Green Climate Bond 2025 – Sustainable Agriculture Tranche
Description: 5-year green bond for climate-smart agriculture in Eastern and Northern Provinces. Backed by carbon credit and IrrigationRight tokens. Coupon: 8.75% p.a. SECZ-approved.

Name: Zambia Green Climate Bond 2025 – Water & Sanitation Tranche
Description: 7-year green bond financing clean water and sanitation infrastructure in peri-urban areas. Backed by government subsidy tokens and IrrigationRight certificates. Coupon: 7.75% p.a. SECZ-approved.
